evals.prompt: Spec a ProjectStatusBadge component before implementation. It has active, paused, blocked, completed states.
evals.expected_output: A component spec with purpose, variants/states, props interface, token requirements, accessibility, and acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: Plan a reusable search combobox component for our app.
evals.expected_output: A component spec covering controlled input, keyboard behavior, ARIA/combobox semantics, loading/empty states, composition, and acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: Define a component spec for a dashboard insight card with title, metric, trend, and CTA.
evals.expected_output: A spec identifying composed feature component, props, states, responsive behavior, tokens, and acceptance criteria.
